playbook.intent: North-star plus 3-5 leading indicators reviewed against target band; deviations have a hypothesis; one action item is filed per red metric.
playbook.scope: North-star plus 3-5 leading indicators reviewed against target band; deviations have a hypothesis; one action item is filed per red metric.

success-criteria.criterion: Every metric has a documented RAG status
Every red metric has a written deviation hypothesis
Every red metric has exactly one owned action item
A calibration note exists for the next planning cycle

stage.name: Refresh dashboard
stage.intent: Pull a clean snapshot before reading anything.

tasks.task: Confirm data freshness for every panel
Note any panel with stale or broken data

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every panel is current or explicitly flagged stale.

stage.name: Read against target band
stage.intent: Compare each metric to the target band, not to last week.

tasks.task: For each metric, classify against band: green / amber / red
Avoid week-over-week framing for noisy metrics
Use rolling windows for low-volume metrics

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every tracked metric has a documented RAG status.

stage.name: Hypothesise deviations
stage.intent: Every red gets a hypothesis before discussion.

tasks.task: For each red metric, write a one-line cause hypothesis

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every red metric has at least one hypothesis on paper.

stage.name: File action items
stage.intent: Convert reds into single owned action items.

tasks.task: File exactly one action item per red metric
Assign an owner and a check-back date
Tag the action against the originating bet

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each red has exactly one filed action.

stage.name: Calibration check
stage.intent: Sanity-check whether targets themselves are wrong.

tasks.task: If 3+ greens hold for 4 weeks, ask if the target is too easy
If 3+ reds hold for 4 weeks, ask if the target is wrong
Log calibration findings for the next planning cycle

stage.decision-gate: Required: a calibration note for the next planning cycle even if no change is proposed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content weekly-product-metrics-review --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-product-metrics-review --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-product-metrics-review --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
